name: Fuel Drum (55 Gallon)
prompt:
US military 55-gallon steel drum. Standard fuel/supply container used throughout Vietnam firebases.

Physical structure:
- Drum: upright steel cylinder, ~0.6m diameter, ~0.9m tall
  - Cylindrical body with 2 rolling hoops (raised rings at 1/3 and 2/3 height)
  - Top: flat with two bung holes (small cylinders protruding)
  - Bottom: flat base
- Very simple geometry - just a cylinder with minor details

Colors: OD green (0x556B2F) or rusty (0x8a5530 for weathered version)
Orientation: Standing upright at Y=0
Scale: Real-world meters (~0.6m diameter, ~0.9m tall)
